programme.title: Lost In Tasmania
programme.desc: Lost In Tasmania takes viewers on a journey of discovery and adventure in search of surfing nirvana - perfect waves! We travel with local surfer Mikey Brennan as he and friends explore the secluded East Coast of Tasmania, the Tasman Peninsula and famed Shipstern Bluff where they find incredible scenery and epic waves.

programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep102: Ocean Impact
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep108: Behind-The-Scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting
programme.desc: Hot Water goes behind-the-scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep211: Nova Scotia, Canada
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull explores the history Nova Scotia with a to-the-centimetre replica of the “Hector”, checks out the oldest Yacht Club in the Americas and then goes Tidal Bore Rafting.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep107: Maui, Hawaii - USA
programme.desc: Adventures on Maui include ATV riding at Kahomo Ranch, watching Cirque Polynesia, sailing on Teralani, enjoying the Wailele Polynesian Luau and having fun at Mulligans/Willie K.

programme.title: Shark Encounters in the Deep
programme.desc: Hand-feeding and “flipping” Tiger Sharks in the Bahamas, diving with Great Whites near Mexico’s Guadalupe Island, learn how to put sharks into a relaxed state known as “Tonic Immobility”, enabling sharks to serve as camera operators.

programme.title: Lost In Tasmania
programme.desc: Lost In Tasmania takes viewers on a journey of discovery and adventure in search of surfing nirvana - perfect waves! programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep102: Ocean Impact
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.title: K2 Snowboarding Presents: Jumbo Easy
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Dopamine
programme.desc: Dopamine is a naturally occurring chemical produced by the human brain, which controls movement and reward. In the world of progressive snowboarding, the joy of physical movement and the reward of being outside are the two greatest factors motivating riders to evolve and innovate. The Absinthe Films documentary Dopamine captures professional snowboarders pushing boundaries and chasing storms across the Chilkats, Valhallas, Monashees, Dolomites, and Pyrenees mountains.

programme.title: La Zone
programme.desc:
In the early 2000's, snowboard filmer David 'Vlad' Vladyka and a handful of riders discovered an off-the-radar area on the French-Swiss border that held massive potential for shooting freestyle snowboarding. The mountain pass featured rolling terrain punctuated by steep roll overs that are perfect for building jumps. The area was Le Col de Cou, and though it had a name, the riders called it 'La Zone', a purposefully vague nickname that would help them keep the area a secret.
Over the next decade, La Zone would become one of the most productive and standard setting locations for filming freestyle snowboarding in all of Europe. Shots from La Zone were featured in several Absinthe films, and many others.
Now 20 years later, Jones team rider Mat Schaer and Vlad still return to La Zone to film from time to time, but the pristine slopes they enjoyed in the past are much harder to find as Le Col de Cou has become a popular ski touring destination.
Featuring new and historic footage from La Zone, this new short film directed by Julien Rosens, and produced by Absinthe Films, highlights the history, beauty and inevitable evolution of this legendary shred spot.
Credits LA ZONE, a movie directed by Julien Roserens Produced by Absinthe Films Supported by Jonessnowboards, Region Dents du Midi, Doodah store Edited by Jules Guarneri Soundmix by Stephane Chapelle Graphics by René Zumstein Photo by Michael Cordey Music : Tugrul by Ochre, Rhea by Yehezkel Raz, Where It Beginns It Ends by Be Still The Earth, Strange Life de YGGL, Let Us Get Out by Redder

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 2 - Strzegom
programme.desc: Great Britain might have won the first leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup, but Strzegom is a new opportunity for the other teams to shine. Poland has started with a 128.8 team point lead, but Germany is following closely on 135.0. Who will be the winning team?

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 3 - Le Pin au Haras
programme.desc: Le Grand Complet, the third leg of the 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup series is being celebrated in Le Pin au Haras, Normandy. Known as the Versailles for Horses, it provides a fitting location for spectacular competition. Germany is fresh from victory at Strzegom, but France is not ready to lose in home grounds. How will this leg develop?

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Stunts, studs sanctuaries
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we go behind the scenes with The Devil’s Horsemen - a family run company who have been providing horses carriages for the film industry for over 30 years, we break down the art of dressage training at Australia’s Mulawa Performance, and we follow a successful rehabilitation and rehoming story at the Mare Foal Sanctuary in England.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Wild horses Switzerland's jumping prodigy
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re taming some of New Zealand’s feral Kaimanawa horses with Kiwi adventurer Chloe Phillips-Harris, aiming for Tokyo and beyond with young Swiss jumper Bryan Balsiger, and swapping machinery for horses at one of Italy’s most environmentally friendly vineyards.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Bring the Vancouver Aquarium to life on your screen! Witness the stunning diversity of marine life and vibrant fish, accompanied by peaceful music and the graceful movement of seaweed. This calming video lets you relax and escape into the wonders of the ocean.

programme.title: time2Rlx Fire
programme.desc: Experience the stunning 2023 Kīlauea eruption through the lens of Roman Khomlyak. Feel the power, warmth, and serenity of nature’s beauty as molten lava dances across the landscape.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Experience the serene underwater life of the Red Sea with cheerful fish, brilliant coral reefs, and the remains of a sunken ship. This virtual dive, paired with calming music and underwater sounds, offers a peaceful escape to help you relax and find inspiration.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche GT3 RS bears a very special wing on its back. Also: the Mercedes-AMG GT S provides understatement and power at the same time. And: the even more uncompromising Radical RX C Turbo.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged are big and have a lot of power, so that they could even take on sports cars. Also: with the Bentayga, Bentley presented the brand's first SUV model. And: the Jaguar F-Pace.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German manufacturer Roding created a car that even outshined the Porsche GT3 with an impressive power/weight ratio. British makes like the Caterham 620 R, Lotus Elise or Radical RXC also showed what's in play in regards to lightweight sports cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: For more than 50 years the Porsche 911 has been holding the crown as one of the best sports cars in the world. Two manufacturers recently jousted with the 911, with the Jaguar F-Type R and the Mercedes AMG GT S as Porsche’s rivals.

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Sail-Ho Croatia we are continuing our adventure journeying through beautiful islands of the Zadar archipelago. We will first stop in Biograd, the host of the largest Boat Show in this part of Europe. After that, we’ll visit the stunning islands of Olib, Silba and Premuda and head over to Ugljan and Pašman. Stay with us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7
programme.desc: The story of Split has been going on for 17 centuries, ever since the Roman emperor Diocletian decided to build a palace on this peninsula. Today, it offers tourists with an attractive and rich tradition, magnificent history, cultural heritage and beautiful nature. This is why Split is considered an unmissable destination in the Adriatic. Stay tuned in our new episode of Sail-Ho!

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 2
programme.desc: We begin this day of discoveries with a visit to the most important historical landmarks in Stone Town. For lunch, we head straight on to The Rock: one of Zanzibar's greatest icons. The restaurant was literally built on a rock and can only be reached on foot during the low tide. Then, we will follow Shabed's suggestion and dive into the water to try all the activities available.

programme.title: Discovering Murray River
programme.desc: Beppe Faresin is facing a new challenge kayaking across Australia. He explores a land that isn't part of the usual tourist spots which is far from the usual journeys provided by tour operators.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the Atlantic Cup presented by 11th Hour Racing. Teams of two on a 40-foot race boat gather to race the East Coast of the United States. They will battle the elements and themselves for the right to call themselves Atlantic Cup champions. We will recap on the previous editions action before embarking on this new adventure. Are you ready?

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 3
programme.desc: The third event of the GC32 Racing Tour is taking place in Villasimius, in Italy. Taking place in mid-September on Sardinia's southeastern point, the GC32 Racing Tour has worked hard with the authorities to plant here one of the most important international competitions in foiling racing. Will Allinghi continue their winning streak in Italian waters?Find out the best moments of the competition of the GC32 Villasimius World Championship.

programme.title: FUN FOIL FEST - España Mar Menor - Los Alcázares

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E09 - Queen Camilla
programme.desc: The documentary Queen Camilla? takes a closer look at Camilla Parker-Bowles, covering her history, her life, and what lies ahead. It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E06 - Missing
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville disappears while trying to transport building supplies by boat. Meanwhile, Pat and Connie Harvie have to handle a flood of volcano experts showing up at the most isolated ranch in America.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E01 - Sturgeon Spearing
programme.desc: Michigan's District 3 is home to the state's only sturgeon spearing season. The limit is low, but the reward can be a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E02 - Snowmobile Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers in the U. P. have a lengthy snowmobile season to patrol. From sound checks to safe riding on trails, it's never a dull day in the snow.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E08 - No Short Cuts
programme.desc: Tim demands a lot of everyone around him, especially during a cave rescue, which he describes as the worst kind of rescue.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E01 - Naturally Breathtaking
programme.desc: Do you know where in the world the last untouched glacier is? Where is the highest and the smallest waterfall? Which desert is the driest or the largest? Would you like to know where the most inaccessible mountains, the lowest point of the oceans or the great salt deserts are? This series offers all the answers.In the first episode, we discover breathtaking glaciers in Argentina, infinite plane in the middle of Europe, thermal miracles of Hungary, stalactite caves protected by UNESCO and the most active volcano in New Zealand – White island.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E01 - Riggins Gold
programme.desc: Today on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are on the mighty Salmon River, doing some underwater metal detecting, looking for gold nuggets.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E02 - Blue Bucket Oregon Trail
programme.desc: Today on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are on the Oregon trail, hunting for the legendary Blue Bucket Mine.

programme.title: Farewell Halong
programme.desc: For generations, the Nguyen family has lived on and off the water amid breathtaking natural scenery. Now they are threatened with forced resettlement.

programme.title: Floating
programme.desc: A lesbian bachelorette’s night out with "the guys", including, alas, her future sperm donor. A mumblecore comedy on a raft.

programme.title: Queen of Niendorf
programme.desc: In this celebration of childhood, a 10-year-old girl struggles to find her place in a 'boys' world.

programme.title: Rocket Perelman
programme.desc: In a quest for self-directed living, ten artists near Berlin join forces to start the artist's colony 'Rakete Perelman'. But, they need money.

programme.title: Kick It Like a Girl
programme.desc: The Team - Harmony and team spirit are very important to the SGS girls' team. But the four protagonists have also experienced discrimination and even violence.

programme.title: Holy Island
programme.desc: Rosa and David, two lost souls, try to escape purgatory. But only one of them can be saved in the end.

programme.title: Focus on Infinity

programme.title: FtWTF - Female to What The ...
programme.desc: Six people talk about the absurd, the sad and above all the beautiful aspects of transitioning.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alice and the Vampire Queen
programme.desc: Alice Oldman is an ex-con struggling to overcome the scars from her past. Then one night a dark stranger gives her an offer she cannot refuse. Make one special dish for his boss, the Vampire Queen.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Say Yes to Simple
programme.desc: In “Say Yes To Simple,” Holly Furtick of Elevation Church reveals simple, practical ways to face our toughest situations.

programme.title: Win Before You Begin
programme.desc: Winning starts long before the battle does. When your thoughts are grounded in God’s truth, fear loses its hold and peace takes its place. You walk in victory when you let God’s Word shape how you see your situation.

programme.title: New Number Same Name
programme.desc: If you’re looking at what’s next and feeling nervous, remember this: What God has done in your life is only the foundation, not the finish line. He’s a creative God, still at work in ways you’re not expecting. Let go of your plan so God can show you His purpose.

programme.title: Just A Little Bit
programme.desc: Is it bad to complain? Joyce Meyer sheds light on what God’s Word says about it and provides practical strategies for living a grateful, holy life.

programme.title: The War Of Whispers
programme.desc: Ever feel like there are too many voices telling you what to do and who to be? The enemy whispers fear, doubt, and distraction, but God’s whisper brings peace, purpose, and direction. When you stop agreeing with the enemy’s lies and start trusting the whisper of the One who sent you, you’ll find confidence in where — and who — you are.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel tries to abuse Camila, a gloved hand hits him. Everyone blames Camila and she defends herself saying she did not see the murderer. Torrealba insists on interrogating her. Everyone: Octavia, Astrid, Max, Marcelina, Leandro, Gregorio and even Sebastián had motives to kill Ezequiel. Only Max is arrested, as the presumed perpetrator of the crime.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max is arrested and Camila assures that he is innocent. Santiago tells the inspector that he saw Max cleaning the object with which Ezequiel was killed and, sadly, he concludes that he and Camila were the perpetrators. The interrogations continue.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: In a love surrender, Victoria and Nicolás promise to love each other forever and renounce everything that could disturb their happiness. Now that she is expecting Nicolás' child, Florencia will not allow Victoria to get in the way of their marriage and so she lets Adelaida know, who throws her out of her house while Hilario cannot believe that his beloved is expecting another man's child. Nicolás assures Florencia that he is responsible for their child, but he can no longer be tied to her. Nicolás visits Victoria to express his decision to stay with her and his son because he can no longer be tied to Florencia, but Victoria lets him know that she cannot accept to take him away from the woman who is expecting his child.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Refusing to accept Victoria's decision to stay away from him now that he will be the father of the child that Florencia is expecting, Nicolás tries to convince his beloved to trust that it is possible to be together. Florencia shows up at Victoria's house to find out if she is capable of staying together with Nicolás in spite of her condition; once Nicolás arrives, Florencia stands up for her love for the father of her child.Faced with the discouragement that overwhelms Victoria, Hilario unburdens himself with Adelaida, as he fears he cannot protect his daughter from the suffering caused by the news of Florencia's pregnancy;

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena begins to open up to Marco Aurelio, and tells him that her ex-partner is a criminal, a murderer, who has threatened her with the life of her own son. Patricia does not mix her personal life with her work, so she will help the nurse get her son back. Pablo sees photos of Malena with Alfonso and orders to continue the follow-up, as they will be evidence that he will present to take the child from her. Lorena shows a photo of Guillermo to Marco Aurelio on his cell phone and he identifies him without a doubt as the hitman who tried to kill him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Omar suspects that Marco Aurelio has information that he does not reveal, but the clever lawyer does not give himself away. Omar and the Chief of Police rule out the possibility that people linked to a cartel are behind Marco Aurelio's assassination attempt. Claudio promises Lorena to personally deliver Ignacio to him if he ends his brother's life. Lorena holds the gun, looking for the strength to fire it.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Berenice claims Israel never loved her enough; the overwhelmed woman decrees that she hates her father for destroying her life.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max está demasiado dolido y no cree ya en ese amor, advirtiéndole que a partir de ahora se dedicará a odiarla, a olvidarla y que será ella la victima de su propia decisión. Ciego de ira y de dolor, grita a los presentes que se retiren pues no habrá boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Reto Sangriento
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes investigadores de fenómenos paranormales reciben el reto de pasar un fin de semana en una casa donde habitan seres malignos. Esto con el fin de presentar las evidencias en su programa de televisión y levantar el rating, pero lo que no saben es que el reto les costara muy caro.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Asesinos Sin Ley
programme.desc: Mickey y Jenny son imigrantes indocumentados, un dia el patrón de Jenny trata de abusar de ella, Mickey lo sorprende y lo mata haceindo justicia por su propia mano así se desatan una cacería de criminales abusadores, todo lo sueben a las redes convirtiéndose en los anti-héroes más populares por hacer justicia a los desamparados.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones
programme.desc: Aprovechando la ausencia de su esposa, un hombre se sumerge en las tentaciones que ofrece el ciber espacio y conoce a una mujer casada. Ellos vivirán un romance idílico sin dimensionar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aute Retrato
programme.desc: Recopilación de los mejores momentos de Luis Eduardo Aute en sus 50 años de carrera musical y artística. Un recorrido por sus distintas facetas creativas y sus bandas sonoras. Toda la vida el artista desvelada por un grupo de testigos, colaboradores y amigos que, a través de sus testimonios, demuestran el impacto que han tenido sus icónicas canciones sobre la actualidad musical.

programme.title: Asesinos Sin Ley

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
